overview: SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRMIST), Kattankulathur, established in 1985, is one of India's leading private universities known for strong industry connections, global collaborations, and a high placement record across engineering, management, and sciences. It is particularly recognized for its 'Dream' and 'Super Dream' placement culture.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹1,25,000 – ₹2,37,500 per semester depending on branch and admission phase. One-time fee ~₹10,000. Hostel & Mess: ~₹60,000 – ₹1,50,000 per semester.
₹80,000 – ₹85,000 per semester. Other charges ~₹5,000 per semester.

placements.companiesVisited: Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Morgan Stanley, Toyota, Honda, Barclays, JP Morgan Chase, Cisco, TCS
placements.internationalOffers: Offers up to ₹1 Crore in previous cycles (e.g., Amazon Germany)

keyTrends.highestPackageTrend: Highest package rose from ₹52 LPA (2023–24) to ₹65 LPA (2024–25)

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are primarily based on SRMJEEE rank followed by counseling. Scholarships and fee waivers are offered based on rank and merit.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow SRMJEEE phases and institute admission calendar.

campus.specialNote: Hostel charges vary by room type (~₹60,000–₹1,50,000 per semester). One-time admission fee ~₹10,000. Founder's Scholarship (Top 100 SRMJEEE): 100% fee waiver. Merit scholarships: 25%–100% tuition waiver based on SRMJEEE rank.

contact.address: SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Kattankulathur – 603203, Tamil Nadu, India
